summary: The time to issue a Section 8 voucher after a completed application swung from 26 days to 77 days over three years mainly because of a shift in voucher type, according to HPD: Project-Based Vouchers, where households are matched directly to an available unit, are much faster to process than Tenant-Based Vouchers, where holders must find and secure a rental on the private market themselves. Fiscal 2025 saw a larger share of Tenant-Based Vouchers issued, slowing the process, while fiscal 2024's faster time reflected more Project-Based Vouchers that year.
